text: [user]: Use celsius_to_f to convert 200 degrees Celsius.

Sure! Let me convert 200°C to Fahrenheit right away!🌡️ **Conversion Result:**

| Celsius | Fahrenheit |
|---------|------------|
| 200 °C  | **392 °F** |

**200 degrees Celsius** is equal to **392 degrees Fahrenheit**, calculated using the standard formula:

> **°F = (°C × 9/5) + 32**
> (200 × 9/5) + 32 = 360 + 32 = **392°F**

That's extremely hot — well above the boiling point of water (212°F / 100°C) and commonly seen in baking and industrial processes! 🔥
